channel.title: Language Transfer Spanish
channel.description: Please share far and wide and help us get this wonderful free resource out to as many people as possible! Please help support and shape LT for as little as $1 a month whilst voting for the next course to be created with The Thinking Method! www.patreon.com/languagetransfer
channel.itunes:author: Language Transfer
channel.itunes:summary: Hosted mirror for Language Transfer's Complete Spanish lessons.

item.title: Complete Spanish 90
item.description: Closes with dialect differences such as leismo and vosotros and how regional variation fits into the larger system.
item.content:encoded: Closes with dialect differences such as leismo and vosotros and how regional variation fits into the larger system.

item.title: Complete Spanish 89
item.description: Encourages making your own rules from patterns so you can keep learning beyond the course.
item.content:encoded: Encourages making your own rules from patterns so you can keep learning beyond the course.

item.title: Complete Spanish 88
item.description: Covers irregular preterite stems like pus- in poner.
item.content:encoded: Covers irregular preterite stems like pus- in poner.

item.title: Complete Spanish 87
item.description: Reviews irregular imperfect forms such as era and other line-in-the-past irregulars.
item.content:encoded: Reviews irregular imperfect forms such as era and other line-in-the-past irregulars.

item.title: Complete Spanish 86
item.description: Shows how go verbs also behave differently in the future and conditional.
item.content:encoded: Shows how go verbs also behave differently in the future and conditional.

item.title: Complete Spanish 85
item.description: Reviews go verbs in the subjunctive and in formal commands like salga and ponga.
item.content:encoded: Reviews go verbs in the subjunctive and in formal commands like salga and ponga.

item.title: Complete Spanish 84
item.description: Wraps up the full tense and mood system and emphasizes active listening and analysis.
item.content:encoded: Wraps up the full tense and mood system and emphasizes active listening and analysis.

item.title: Complete Spanish 83
item.description: Practices the past subjunctive in sentences about what someone may have bought or done.
item.content:encoded: Practices the past subjunctive in sentences about what someone may have bought or done.

item.title: Complete Spanish 82
item.description: Uses the subjunctive after evaluations like no es muy relevante que and esta bien que.
item.content:encoded: Uses the subjunctive after evaluations like no es muy relevante que and esta bien que.

item.title: Complete Spanish 81
item.description: Practices the subjunctive after no quiero que with reflexive verbs like cerrarse.
item.content:encoded: Practices the subjunctive after no quiero que with reflexive verbs like cerrarse.

item.title: Complete Spanish 80
item.description: Reviews the many uses of se, from sé to reflexive se and pronoun-replacement se.
item.content:encoded: Reviews the many uses of se, from sé to reflexive se and pronoun-replacement se.

item.title: Complete Spanish 79
item.description: Reviews subjunctive triggers with dejar and message or command sentences.
item.content:encoded: Reviews subjunctive triggers with dejar and message or command sentences.

item.title: Complete Spanish 78
item.description: Shows how seguir plus gerund works and how phrases like es probable que trigger the subjunctive.
item.content:encoded: Shows how seguir plus gerund works and how phrases like es probable que trigger the subjunctive.

item.title: Complete Spanish 77
item.description: Practices should and should have constructions such as deberia haber.
item.content:encoded: Practices should and should have constructions such as deberia haber.

item.title: Complete Spanish 76
item.description: Introduces hay for there is and there are and uses it with words like alguien.
item.content:encoded: Introduces hay for there is and there are and uses it with words like alguien.

item.title: Complete Spanish 75
item.description: Covers irregular informal commands like haz and extends the subjunctive to phrases such as wherever.
item.content:encoded: Covers irregular informal commands like haz and extends the subjunctive to phrases such as wherever.

item.title: Complete Spanish 74
item.description: Introduces e-to-i verbs like elegir inside the subjunctive.
item.content:encoded: Introduces e-to-i verbs like elegir inside the subjunctive.

item.title: Complete Spanish 73
item.description: Explains positive informal commands, let us forms, and the main command patterns.
item.content:encoded: Explains positive informal commands, let us forms, and the main command patterns.

item.title: Complete Spanish 72
item.description: Uses negative commands to introduce the subjunctive in everyday orders.
item.content:encoded: Uses negative commands to introduce the subjunctive in everyday orders.

item.title: Complete Spanish 71
item.description: Introduces contar and cuento and practices asking someone to tell or recount something.
item.content:encoded: Introduces contar and cuento and practices asking someone to tell or recount something.

item.title: Complete Spanish 70
item.description: Shows how lo que works for what in statements and how querer que leads into the subjunctive.
item.content:encoded: Shows how lo que works for what in statements and how querer que leads into the subjunctive.

item.title: Complete Spanish 69
item.description: Reviews the full panorama of Spanish tenses and introduces the subjunctive as the final major mood.
item.content:encoded: Reviews the full panorama of Spanish tenses and introduces the subjunctive as the final major mood.

item.title: Complete Spanish 68
item.description: Introduces demonstratives like este, ese, esta, and esa and how they agree with the noun.
item.content:encoded: Introduces demonstratives like este, ese, esta, and esa and how they agree with the noun.

item.title: Complete Spanish 67
item.description: Focuses on reading and spelling patterns in Spanish through cognates, sound rules, and orthography.
item.content:encoded: Focuses on reading and spelling patterns in Spanish through cognates, sound rules, and orthography.

item.title: Complete Spanish 66
item.description: Explains possession in Spanish, especially with body parts and the verb doler.
item.content:encoded: Explains possession in Spanish, especially with body parts and the verb doler.

item.title: Complete Spanish 65
item.description: Teaches nada mas and nadie mas while reinforcing Spanish double negatives.
item.content:encoded: Teaches nada mas and nadie mas while reinforcing Spanish double negatives.

item.title: Complete Spanish 64
item.description: Uses hace for ago and practices responder with indirect objects.
item.content:encoded: Uses hace for ago and practices responder with indirect objects.

item.title: Complete Spanish 63
item.description: Introduces acordarse and uses it to say what you do and do not remember.
item.content:encoded: Introduces acordarse and uses it to say what you do and do not remember.

item.title: Complete Spanish 62
item.description: Covers dar as a preterite irregular and practices pronouns with forms like dio.
item.content:encoded: Covers dar as a preterite irregular and practices pronouns with forms like dio.

item.title: Complete Spanish 61
item.description: Combines the imperfect and the preterite in sentences like I was cooking when the phone rang.
item.content:encoded: Combines the imperfect and the preterite in sentences like I was cooking when the phone rang.

item.title: Complete Spanish 60
item.description: Explains that hablamos can mean either we speak or we spoke and how context resolves the ambiguity.
item.content:encoded: Explains that hablamos can mean either we speak or we spoke and how context resolves the ambiguity.

item.title: Complete Spanish 59
item.description: Practices regular preterite endings with verbs like comer and salir while emphasizing stress and contrast with other tenses.
item.content:encoded: Practices regular preterite endings with verbs like comer and salir while emphasizing stress and contrast with other tenses.

item.title: Complete Spanish 58
item.description: Introduces the preterite as the point-in-the-past tense and sets up its core endings.
item.content:encoded: Introduces the preterite as the point-in-the-past tense and sets up its core endings.

item.title: Complete Spanish 57
item.description: Reviews the present-tense nosotros forms and the one key difference between -er and -ir verbs.
item.content:encoded: Reviews the present-tense nosotros forms and the one key difference between -er and -ir verbs.

item.title: Complete Spanish 56
item.description: Reviews prepositions and shows that Spanish does not strand them at the ends of sentences.
item.content:encoded: Reviews prepositions and shows that Spanish does not strand them at the ends of sentences.

item.title: Complete Spanish 55
item.description: Uses forms like esta cancelado to show how past participles behave as adjectives with estar.
item.content:encoded: Uses forms like esta cancelado to show how past participles behave as adjectives with estar.

item.title: Complete Spanish 54
item.description: Shows how past participles after haber also work as adjectives and in phrases like me gustaria haber ido.
item.content:encoded: Shows how past participles after haber also work as adjectives and in phrases like me gustaria haber ido.

item.title: Complete Spanish 53
item.description: Contrasts past could with conditional could by using podia versus podria.
item.content:encoded: Contrasts past could with conditional could by using podia versus podria.

item.title: Complete Spanish 52
item.description: Teaches para plus infinitive for in-order-to constructions.
item.content:encoded: Teaches para plus infinitive for in-order-to constructions.

item.title: Complete Spanish 51
item.description: Distinguishes para and por through expressions such as estoy para ti and estoy aqui por ti.
item.content:encoded: Distinguishes para and por through expressions such as estoy para ti and estoy aqui por ti.

item.title: Complete Spanish 50
item.description: Uses gracias por venir to contrast por and para and show when each kind of for is used.
item.content:encoded: Uses gracias por venir to contrast por and para and show when each kind of for is used.

item.title: Complete Spanish 49
item.description: Introduces llamar for phone calls and names, including how to ask and say what someone is called.
item.content:encoded: Introduces llamar for phone calls and names, including how to ask and say what someone is called.

item.title: Complete Spanish 48
item.description: Teaches the imperfect -ia pattern for -er and -ir verbs and uses forms like se vende.
item.content:encoded: Teaches the imperfect -ia pattern for -er and -ir verbs and uses forms like se vende.

item.title: Complete Spanish 47
item.description: Teaches the imperfect -aba pattern with verbs like cenar and quemar.
item.content:encoded: Teaches the imperfect -aba pattern with verbs like cenar and quemar.

item.title: Complete Spanish 46
item.description: Introduces the two main simple-past viewpoints: the ongoing line in the past and the point in the past.
item.content:encoded: Introduces the two main simple-past viewpoints: the ongoing line in the past and the point in the past.

item.title: Complete Spanish 45
item.description: Expands gustar with nos gusta and le gusta, emphasizing indirect objects and who something pleases.
item.content:encoded: Expands gustar with nos gusta and le gusta, emphasizing indirect objects and who something pleases.

item.title: Complete Spanish 44
item.description: Teaches Greek-origin masculine nouns ending in -ma and related word families such as problema and sistema.
item.content:encoded: Teaches Greek-origin masculine nouns ending in -ma and related word families such as problema and sistema.

item.title: Complete Spanish 43
item.description: Builds the conditional perfect with habria plus a past participle for sentences like I would have gone.
item.content:encoded: Builds the conditional perfect with habria plus a past participle for sentences like I would have gone.

item.title: Complete Spanish 42
item.description: Introduces the conditional endings and frames gustar as meaning to be pleasing rather than to like.
item.content:encoded: Introduces the conditional endings and frames gustar as meaning to be pleasing rather than to like.

item.title: Complete Spanish 41
item.description: Reviews future expression again and practices when to use the present versus ir a plus infinitive.
item.content:encoded: Reviews future expression again and practices when to use the present versus ir a plus infinitive.

item.title: Complete Spanish 40
item.description: Explores how prepositions change meaning across languages, including structures like enamorarse de.
item.content:encoded: Explores how prepositions change meaning across languages, including structures like enamorarse de.

item.title: Complete Spanish 39
item.description: Introduces prepositions with pronouns, such as con el, con nosotros, and para ella, in fuller sentence building.
item.content:encoded: Introduces prepositions with pronouns, such as con el, con nosotros, and para ella, in fuller sentence building.

item.title: Complete Spanish 38
item.description: Explains how lo, la, los, and las become le or les in indirect uses and reviews reflexive and reciprocal pronouns.
item.content:encoded: Explains how lo, la, los, and las become le or les in indirect uses and reviews reflexive and reciprocal pronouns.

item.title: Complete Spanish 37
item.description: Introduces the simple future tense and practices it with dar plus object pronouns.
item.content:encoded: Introduces the simple future tense and practices it with dar plus object pronouns.

item.title: Complete Spanish 36
item.description: Revisits future expression through the present and ir a plus infinitive in more varied contexts.
item.content:encoded: Revisits future expression through the present and ir a plus infinitive in more varied contexts.

item.title: Complete Spanish 35
item.description: Uses adjectives like sincero to show how ser and estar interact with traits versus temporary states.
item.content:encoded: Uses adjectives like sincero to show how ser and estar interact with traits versus temporary states.

item.title: Complete Spanish 34
item.description: Reviews common daily-action verbs and adds desayunar alongside dormir, hablar, and comer.
item.content:encoded: Reviews common daily-action verbs and adds desayunar alongside dormir, hablar, and comer.

item.title: Complete Spanish 33
item.description: Continues ser and estar with listo and similar adjectives whose meaning shifts with the verb used.
item.content:encoded: Continues ser and estar with listo and similar adjectives whose meaning shifts with the verb used.

item.title: Complete Spanish 32
item.description: Uses aburrido to show how ser and estar can change a word between a characteristic and a temporary state.
item.content:encoded: Uses aburrido to show how ser and estar can change a word between a characteristic and a temporary state.

item.title: Complete Spanish 31
item.description: Continues ser and estar while highlighting sound patterns like the added e before s plus consonant.
item.content:encoded: Continues ser and estar while highlighting sound patterns like the added e before s plus consonant.

item.title: Complete Spanish 30
item.description: Practices estar in common questions and location phrases such as como estas and donde estamos.
item.content:encoded: Practices estar in common questions and location phrases such as como estas and donde estamos.

item.title: Complete Spanish 29
item.description: Introduces the core contrast between ser and estar and the idea that Spanish divides English to be in two.
item.content:encoded: Introduces the core contrast between ser and estar and the idea that Spanish divides English to be in two.

item.title: Complete Spanish 28
item.description: Covers regional vocabulary variation and alternative everyday words used across the Spanish-speaking world.
item.content:encoded: Covers regional vocabulary variation and alternative everyday words used across the Spanish-speaking world.

item.title: Complete Spanish 27
item.description: Introduces adjective placement after nouns and expands descriptive noun phrases like la situacion global.
item.content:encoded: Introduces adjective placement after nouns and expands descriptive noun phrases like la situacion global.

item.title: Complete Spanish 26
item.description: Practices quedarse, voy a plus infinitive, and time expressions while building more natural everyday sentences.
item.content:encoded: Practices quedarse, voy a plus infinitive, and time expressions while building more natural everyday sentences.

item.title: Complete Spanish 25
item.description: Explains how me, te, and nos can mean direct, indirect, or reflexive objects in sentences with hablar and similar verbs.
item.content:encoded: Explains how me, te, and nos can mean direct, indirect, or reflexive objects in sentences with hablar and similar verbs.

item.title: Complete Spanish 24
item.description: Introduces dar and builds sentences with direct and indirect object pronouns around giving.
item.content:encoded: Introduces dar and builds sentences with direct and indirect object pronouns around giving.

item.title: Complete Spanish 23
item.description: Reviews the full haber paradigm and combines it with grammar points such as masculine nouns ending in -ma.
item.content:encoded: Reviews the full haber paradigm and combines it with grammar points such as masculine nouns ending in -ma.

item.title: Complete Spanish 22
item.description: Practices he plus past participles with verbs like terminar and shows how to build completed-past statements.
item.content:encoded: Practices he plus past participles with verbs like terminar and shows how to build completed-past statements.

item.title: Complete Spanish 21
item.description: Introduces the present perfect with haber and explains how Spanish uses a present auxiliary to speak about the past.
item.content:encoded: Introduces the present perfect with haber and explains how Spanish uses a present auxiliary to speak about the past.

item.title: Complete Spanish 20
item.description: Shows how the present and ir a plus infinitive express the future, using ver and time phrases like pronto and la semana que viene.
item.content:encoded: Shows how the present and ir a plus infinitive express the future, using ver and time phrases like pronto and la semana que viene.

item.title: Complete Spanish 19
item.description: Adds everyday vocabulary like siempre, bueno, carne, and alcohol while practicing the present and working backward from verb forms.
item.content:encoded: Adds everyday vocabulary like siempre, bueno, carne, and alcohol while practicing the present and working backward from verb forms.

item.title: Complete Spanish 18
item.description: Teaches the nosotros forms in the present and the one key difference between -er and -ir verbs.
item.content:encoded: Teaches the nosotros forms in the present and the one key difference between -er and -ir verbs.

item.title: Complete Spanish 17
item.description: Extends stem-changing verbs across more people and patterns, including wanting, losing, and other common present-tense changes.
item.content:encoded: Extends stem-changing verbs across more people and patterns, including wanting, losing, and other common present-tense changes.

item.title: Complete Spanish 16
item.description: Introduces comenzar and empezar, reinforces e-to-ie changes, and uses them alongside related verbs like poder and dormir.
item.content:encoded: Introduces comenzar and empezar, reinforces e-to-ie changes, and uses them alongside related verbs like poder and dormir.

item.title: Complete Spanish 15
item.description: Practices que pasa and related expressions while extending e-to-ie stem changes with verbs like pensar.
item.content:encoded: Practices que pasa and related expressions while extending e-to-ie stem changes with verbs like pensar.

item.title: Complete Spanish 14
item.description: Covers irregular first-person forms like sé and tengo and uses them in longer sentences with querer, saber, and hacer.
item.content:encoded: Covers irregular first-person forms like sé and tengo and uses them in longer sentences with querer, saber, and hacer.

item.title: Complete Spanish 13
item.description: Introduces hacer and poder, reinforces verb-type identification, and expands the present tense with irregular yo forms and stem changes.
item.content:encoded: Introduces hacer and poder, reinforces verb-type identification, and expands the present tense with irregular yo forms and stem changes.

item.title: Complete Spanish 12
item.description: Introduces the E-based pattern for ER and IR verbs, object pronouns with finite verbs, and common feminine endings and adjective agreement.
item.content:encoded: Introduces the E-based pattern for ER and IR verbs, object pronouns with finite verbs, and common feminine endings and adjective agreement.

item.title: Complete Spanish 11
item.description: Develops present-tense endings for AR verbs, including a, an, as, and amos, and reviews where object pronouns can go.
item.content:encoded: Develops present-tense endings for AR verbs, including a, an, as, and amos, and reviews where object pronouns can go.

item.title: Complete Spanish 10
item.description: Pulls the verb system together with AR, ER, and IR classes, regular yo forms, future context in the present, and go-type irregulars like tengo and vengo.
item.content:encoded: Pulls the verb system together with AR, ER, and IR classes, regular yo forms, future context in the present, and go-type irregulars like tengo and vengo.

item.title: Complete Spanish 09
item.description: Builds longer clauses with saber and si, using querer and venir to say who wants to know or come.
item.content:encoded: Builds longer clauses with saber and si, using querer and venir to say who wants to know or come.

item.title: Complete Spanish 08
item.description: Introduces feminine forms like la, explains formal versus informal you, and practices venir plus direct objects and debo.
item.content:encoded: Introduces feminine forms like la, explains formal versus informal you, and practices venir plus direct objects and debo.

item.title: Complete Spanish 07
item.description: Teaches how to find Latin equivalents, use continuar and intentar, and connect verbs of movement with a plus infinitive.
item.content:encoded: Teaches how to find Latin equivalents, use continuar and intentar, and connect verbs of movement with a plus infinitive.

item.title: Complete Spanish 06
item.description: Introduces intento, silent h words, ahora, voy, and voy a plus infinitive for immediate future statements.
item.content:encoded: Introduces intento, silent h words, ahora, voy, and voy a plus infinitive for immediate future statements.

item.title: Complete Spanish 05
item.description: Adds yo for emphasis, reflexive forms like informarme, and more noun-to-verb patterns such as -encia and -ancia words.
item.content:encoded: Adds yo for emphasis, reflexive forms like informarme, and more noun-to-verb patterns such as -encia and -ancia words.

item.title: Complete Spanish 04
item.description: Introduces quiero, no quiero, and te quiero while teaching the highly productive -cion to -ar verb conversion.
item.content:encoded: Introduces quiero, no quiero, and te quiero while teaching the highly productive -cion to -ar verb conversion.

item.title: Complete Spanish 03
item.description: Expands convertible words with -ant and -ent, -mente, h for j sounds, and -ible or -able while using es to build simple statements.
item.content:encoded: Expands convertible words with -ant and -ent, -mente, h for j sounds, and -ible or -able while using es to build simple statements.

item.title: Complete Spanish 02
item.description: Introduces Latin-based cognates, Spanish vowel sounds, and the verb es to build simple sentences.
item.content:encoded: Introduces Latin-based cognates, Spanish vowel sounds, and the verb es to build simple sentences.

item.title: Complete Spanish 01
item.description: Introduces the Thinking Method and explains how to work through the course by pausing, thinking, and avoiding memorization.
item.content:encoded: Introduces the Thinking Method and explains how to work through the course by pausing, thinking, and avoiding memorization.
